question: Will USD money supply as measured by M2 have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-11-09?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/WM2NS once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-11-09 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-10-30) was 22243.700. (The latest value released in M2 from the release H.6 Money Stock Measures.)
background:

For questions on FRED functionality, please contact us here (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/contactus/).

. Additional background of the series: 1. the units of the series: Billions of Dollars. 2. the seasonal adjustments of the series: Not Seasonally Adjusted 3. the update frequency: Weekly, Ending Monday
